name: Onion Zucchini Quick Bread, Tried
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. Drain zucchini in a colander.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, cheese, French Fried Onions, baking powder, basil, and salt.
5. In a medium bowl, combine milk, butter, brown sugar, and eggs; whisk until well blended.
6. Squeeze excess liquid from zucchini in a kitchen towel.
7. Stir zucchini into the milk mixture.
8. Stir the milk mixture into the flour mixture, stirring just until moistened (the batter will be very stiff and dry).
9. Pour batter into prepared pan and run a knife down the center.
10. Bake 50-65 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Remove bread from the pan to a wire rack; cool completely.
12. Cut into slices to serve.
Note: 1 1/4 cups whole wheat flour can be substituted for the all-purpose flour. For optimum flavor, wrap bread overnight and serve the next day. This bread is excellent toasted.
